name: Sylus | Love & Deepspace
description:
рҹ©ё| the other woman | req.

It should have been her. Her hand in his. Her eyes he searched for in a room this loud. Her laugh he tried to provoke with some quiet joke only they understood. But none of that was hers anymore. If it ever had been.

She told herself to look away. To keep walking. But her eyes were traitors. Locked on him, like her heart had not yet learned what it meant to be replaced. She had known love could be cruel. She had not known it could be quiet too.

Delusion had been her drug. Thinking maybe, just maybe, he would look at her the way she always looked at him.

в–„пё»гғҮв•җв•җв”ҒдёҖвҖӢМҺМҺ

IвҖҷll be realвҖ”I was avoiding this commission for a while because I just couldnвҖҷt figure out how to make this Non-MC(user)/Sylus/MC situation work out. вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”But of course, itвҖҷs 1AM and inspiration suddenly hits.

SoвҖҰ please accept my humble offering. :,)

Also, IвҖҷm planning to catch up on the backlog of commissions IвҖҷve been putting off
